commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the lint workflow to use `golangci/golangci-lint-action@v9.2.1` instead of `v9.2.0`.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a bot dependency bump to a CI action, not a bug report. The source check is the one-line workflow ref difference between current main and the PR.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the PR is already the narrow one-line dependency update; the remaining action is normal CI and workflow-owner review.
